scripts.build: esbuild offscreen.js --bundle --outfile=build/offscreen.js --format=iife && sed -i "s/var import_meta = {};/var import_meta = { url: (document.currentScript \&\& document.currentScript.src) || location.href };/" build/offscreen.js && sed -i "s/var import_meta2 = {};/var import_meta2 = { url: (document.currentScript \&\& document.currentScript.src) || location.href };/" build/offscreen.js && cp node_modules/onnxruntime-web/dist/ort-wasm-simd-threaded.jsep.wasm node_modules/onnxruntime-web/dist/ort-wasm-simd-threaded.jsep.mjs build/
